name: raccoon-survey
description: Anonymous survey platforms to measure the work environment
author: Javi-CD

scripts.lint:commit-ci: git rev-parse --verify HEAD~1 >/dev/null 2>&1 && commitlint --from=HEAD~1 --to=HEAD --verbose || echo 'No previous commits found. Skipping commit validation.'
scripts.validate:setup: npm run test:commits && echo 'Commit validation setup is working correctly!'
